title: Scout Recrafted Modernized
description: This texture pack will improve the textures from the Scout Recrafted mod.
body:
**Scout Recrafted Modernized**.

This texture pack will improve the textures from the [Scout Recrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/scout-recrafted) mod.

![Before and after comparison.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecbad7f2c08897d7b71c8eb80aff5ae7117924ea.png)
